info.name: MsgHelper OpenAPI 场景化测试集合
info.description: 按业务场景组织的 OpenAPI Postman 集合：调用管理、微信管理、标签管理、好友管理、群管理、群发消息、自动加好友、发朋友圈、快捷回复、自动通过好友申请。

item.name: 同步好友（备注+标签，仅微信）

body.raw:
{
  "wxName": "{{WX_NAME}}",
  "wxVersion": "4",
  "hwnd": {{WX_HWND}},
  "updateRemark": true,
  "updateTags": true,
  "isSyncUp": true,
  "syncType": 3,
  "contacts": [
    {
      "id": "{{CONTACT_ID}}",
      "wxNo": "wxid_demo_001",
      "remark": "同步备注",
      "tags": "客户,VIP"
    }
  ],
  "optSleepTimeStart": 0,
  "optSleepTimeEnd": 0.5
}

item.name: 群发消息-带称呼（文字+图片+文件）

body.raw:
{
  "userWxName": "{{WX_NAME}}",
  "wxInstanceId": "{{WX_INSTANCE_ID}}",
  "wxVersion": "4",
  "hwnd": {{WX_HWND}},
  "selectMode": "contacts",
  "receiverMode": "include",
  "selectedContacts": [{"id": "{{CONTACT_ID}}", "nickName": "{{CONTACT_NICK_NAME}}", "wxNo": "{{CONTACT_WX_NO}}", "callName": "{{CONTACT_CALL_NAME}}", "remark": "", "type": 0}],
  "messages": [
    {
      "msg": "{称呼}您好，这是一条场景化群发测试消息",
      "msgImgUrl": "{{IMG_URL}}",
      "msgFileUrl": "{{FILE_URL}}"
    }
  ],
  "sendSleepTimeStart": 0,
  "sendSleepTimeEnd": 0.5,
  "optSleepTimeStart": 0,
  "optSleepTimeEnd": 0.5,
  "checkDelete": 0,
  "relaxedMode": false
}

item.name: 群发同时检测谁删了我

body.raw:
{
  "taskName": "自动加好友",
  "userWxName": "{{WX_NAME}}",
  "wxInstanceId": "{{WX_INSTANCE_ID}}",
  "userId": "{{USER_ID}}",

  "applyMessage": "你好，我是XX",
  "tags": ["客户"],
  "permission": "朋友圈",
  "sleepTimeMin": 5,
  "sleepTimeMax": 8,
  "optSleepTimeStart": 0.5,
  "optSleepTimeEnd": 1,
  "stopIfTooManyRequests": true,
  "templateId": "",
  "autoStart": true
}
